name: no-man-sky
description: Uma réplica simplificada do jogo No Man's Sky

scripts.bl: tsc && mkdir -p Javascript/mappings && find Javascript -name '*.js.map' -exec mv {} Javascript/mappings \;
scripts.b: tsc && ( if not exist Javascript\mappings\ mkdir Javascript\mappings ) && for /r Javascript %f in (*.js.map) do move "%f" Javascript\mappings\

author: Ale-Reali-705
